summary: Tested all 8 premium UI features for VenuLock marketplace. All features working correctly: Sticky Mobile CTA, Image Mosaic Grid, Smart Search Bar, Customer Reviews, Social Proof Strip, Dark Mode Toggle, and Venue Quick Preview.

sticky_mobile_cta.details: Fixed bottom bar on mobile (390x844) shows price (₹4.5K/plate), call button, and 'Enquire Now' button. Remains sticky after scrolling.

image_mosaic_grid.details: Desktop venue detail page (1920x1080) shows 5-image mosaic grid layout (1 large + 4 small slots). With 2 images, shows 2 filled + 'No more photos' placeholder. Hidden on mobile.

smart_search_bar.details: Autocomplete dropdown appears after typing 'Taj' with venue names (Taj Palace New Delhi, Taj Mahal Palace Mumbai, etc.) and city suggestions. Search submit navigates to /venues/search?q=... with query param.

customer_reviews.details: Shows 'Guest Reviews' section with rating breakdown (Ambiance 4.8, Food & Catering 4.6, Staff 4.7, Value for Money 4.3), 4 review cards with names, ratings, verified badges, and 'Helpful' counts.

social_proof_strip.details: Animated counter strip on landing page shows 4 stats: 2,500+ Events Hosted, 150+ Verified Venues, 4.8 Avg. Rating, 1,800+ Happy Couples. Counters animate when scrolled into view.

dark_mode_toggle.details: Moon icon in header (visible when logged in) toggles dark mode. Clicking adds 'dark' class to html element, clicking sun icon toggles back. Preference stored in localStorage as 'vl_dark_mode'.

venue_quick_preview.details: On desktop search page, hovering over venue card shows popup with venue name, location (area, city), guest capacity, amenities (Parking, AC), and pricing. Uses 400ms delay before appearing.

mobile_venue_carousel.details: Mobile venue detail shows single image carousel instead of mosaic grid. Mosaic grid is correctly hidden on mobile (lg:hidden class).

backend_autocomplete_api.details: GET /api/venues/autocomplete?q=Mum returns city (Mumbai) and venue results. GET /api/venues/autocomplete?q=Taj returns 6 Taj venues across different cities.

test_credentials: testcustomer@test.com / test123 (for dark mode toggle testing)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 8 premium UI features tested and working: Sticky Mobile CTA, Image Mosaic Grid (desktop only), Smart Search Bar with autocomplete, Customer Reviews (MOCKED data from REVIEWS array in CustomerReviews.js), Social Proof Strip with animated counters, Dark Mode Toggle (requires login), Venue Quick Preview on hover (desktop only). The venue at /venues/venue_658884a4e9c1 has 2 images so mosaic shows 2 filled slots + 'No more photos'.

mocked_apis.customer_reviews: Customer reviews in CustomerReviews.js use hardcoded REVIEWS array - not from database
